summary: Iteration 10 - Brand Sponsorship System Testing Complete. Backend: 21/21 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features verified - Admin Brands tab with analytics cards, brand form, brand list, sponsorship form; Guardian student card Brand Stories ON/OFF toggle; Feature Flags tab shows brand_sponsorship_enabled and classroom_sponsorship_enabled.
critical_code_review_comments: All brand CRUD endpoints work correctly: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/brands
Brand analytics endpoint returns total_brand_revenue, total_impressions, active_brands, brands details
Classroom sponsorships work: POST/GET/DELETE /api/admin/classroom-sponsorships with badge_text auto-generated
Student ad preferences: GET/POST /api/students/{id}/ad-preferences with allow_brand_stories, preferred/blocked_categories
Active-for-student endpoint correctly checks: feature flag + guardian opt-in + age targeting + budget remaining + blocked categories
Feature flags include brand_sponsorship_enabled and classroom_sponsorship_enabled (both enabled by default)
Story generation integrates brand placements when: brand_sponsorship_enabled=true AND student.ad_preferences.allow_brand_stories=true
Brand impressions are recorded per story with $0.05 cost and budget_spent is updated on brands
seed_data_creation: Created test brands (TEST_*) during testing - cleaned up automatically by test teardown
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 verified the brand sponsorship system: Admin can CRUD brands with products/categories/budget, create classroom sponsorships, view analytics. Guardians can toggle 'Brand Stories ON/OFF' per student. The active-for-student endpoint checks feature flags + guardian opt-in. Existing brand 'LearnTech Pro' with products exists. Feature flags brand_sponsorship_enabled and classroom_sponsorship_enabled are both TRUE.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/admin/brands - create brand with products/categories - PASSED
GET /api/brands/active-for-student/{id} - empty when opted out - PASSED
GET /api/brands/active-for-student/{id} - returns brands when opted in - PASSED
frontend_ui_tests: Admin Portal Brands tab loads with analytics cards - PASSED
Brand Revenue, Impressions, Active Brands, Classroom Sponsors cards visible - PASSED
Add Brand Sponsor form with name, website, description, products, categories, budget fields - PASSED
Brands list shows existing brands with activate/pause/delete buttons - PASSED
Classroom Sponsorships form with brand select, school name, stories limit, amount paid - PASSED
Guardian Portal student card shows Brand Stories ON/OFF toggle - PASSED
Brand Stories toggle updates correctly via API call - PASSED
Toast notification shows 'Brand story preferences updated' on toggle - PASSED
Features tab shows 9 flags including Brand Story Integration and Classroom Sponsorships - PASSED

components_verified: POST /api/admin/brands creates brand with products[], target_categories[], budget_total, cost_per_impression
GET /api/admin/brands returns list with id, name, products, is_active, budget_total/spent
DELETE /api/admin/brands/{id} removes brand, returns 404 for nonexistent
Returns brands array with per-brand impressions, budget_spent, budget_remaining
POST /api/admin/classroom-sponsorships with brand_id, school_name, stories_limit, amount_paid
Default: allow_brand_stories=false, empty arrays for categories
Returns eligible brands with id, name, products, categories
Admin Portal Brands tab with analytics cards, brand form, sponsorship form
Guardian student card Brand Stories ON/OFF toggle button
Features tab shows all 9 flags including brand/classroom sponsorship
